tagline: Generate flowcharts from text with AI
promptPlaceholder: Describe the algorithm or process you want to visualize...
apiKeyHint: Leave empty to use the server default.
geminiApiKeyHint: Get your key from Google AI Studio, or leave empty to use the server default.
openRouterFreeTooltip: OpenRouter labels some models as Free, but still requires an active billing profile or positive balance to make requests.
missingApiKey: API key is missing. Add it in Settings or set it in .env.
missingServerApiKey: No OpenRouter API key is configured on the server. Add one in Settings or set OPENROUTER_API_KEY in .env.
errorGenerating: Error generating flowchart. Please try again.
